summary: COMPARISON two polar scatter plots of n at (√n · 0.08, n rad) for n ≤ 2500. LEFT BLUE shows all integers revealing the 44 tight spirals and 710 rays structure. RIGHT shows PRIMES only, colored YELLOW if gcd(n,44)=1 and RED otherwise — so primes concentrate on the φ(44)=20 coprime rays. LaggedStart with low lag_ratio reveals each cloud. Legend clarifies color map. Bottom MathTex: '44 spirals but only φ(44)=20 rays can hold primes'.
